area: Frozen vs source-first write deadlock under parallel captains
finding: Frozen `node atm.mjs` refuses writes with `ATM_RUNNER_STALE_WRITE_REFUSED` when source is newer; `--allow-stale-runner` needs emergency; `node atm.dev.mjs` refuses lifecycle claim with `ATM_SOURCE_FIRST_WRITE_REFUSED`. Parallel captains told to prefer Frozen cannot sync without dirtying `release/**`. Template-only changes can also leave frozen integration source snapshots stale while `runnerMode.sourceDrift.syncRequired` remains false.
expectedBehavior: Playbooks should offer a non-emergency source-delivery lane or a scoped runner rebuild that does not absorb foreign release WIP. Runner drift inventory must include integration templates and compiler inputs.
evidenceOrRepro: 2026-07-14 cursor-grok-4.5 dogfood on TASK-AAO-0195 before RFT-0020 completed. Reproduced again while updating `atm-dispatch`: frozen `next` reported `syncRequired: false`, frozen/source-first integration verification disagreed, and a full retained-artifact build was required before all adapter manifests could converge. 2026-07-16 second live repro while preparing TASK-CODEX-011190 on main: frozen `tasks import --write` refused with `ATM_RUNNER_STALE_WRITE_REFUSED`; `--allow-stale-runner` correctly required emergency permission `backend.tasks.import.write`; source-first `tasks import --write` succeeded for ledger-only import, but source-first `next --claim` refused with `ATM_SOURCE_FIRST_WRITE_REFUSED`; frozen claim then hit scope-admission rather than a clean normal lane while unrelated WIP was present. Runner-sync admission also correctly refused/avoided mixing an active WIP window into a retained-artifact build, which is positive gate evidence rather than the defect.
followUp: ATM-GOV-0230 fixed the runner-sync stale reservation portion by allowing same-task sequential sealed sources to advance without a fake receipt and by cleaning superseded generations. Remaining scope is template-aware source drift / adapter-sync coverage and non-emergency ledger-import or source-delivery lanes outside runner-sync steward lifecycle.
